title: AdvancedChatMacros
description: Improve chat with keybinds, functions, and speed
body:
# AdvancedChatMacros

AdvancedChatMacros is an AdvancedChat Module aimed to provide the client with some useful utilities. Macros can hook into AdvancedChatFilters and send messages based on message content, alter text from text box, and create keybinds!
 

## Dependencies

AdvancedChatMacros requires [AdvancedChatCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancedchatcore)


## Configuration

Currently there is no in-game GUI for configuration, but there are configuration files that are highly documented. Go to minecraft directory -> advancedchat -> advancedchatmacros (after running at least once).
